# 关键词搜索视频号 

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: '关键词搜索视频号 '
      deprecated: false
      description: |+
        ### 响应状态码
        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        code = 0  |调用成功
        code = 101      |keywords有误
        code = 20001    |金额不足
        code = 50000    |服务器内部错误


        ### 返回结果
        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        | ['v2_info_list'][i]['contact']['username'] | 1.视频号的唯一id v2_name |
        | ['v2_info_list'][i]['contact']['nickname']  | 1.视频号昵称 |
        | ['v2_info_list'][i]['contact']['signature']  |   1.视频号简介 |
        | ['v2_info_list'][i]['contact']['ext_info']  | 1.视频号ip信息 |
        | ['video_object_list'][i]['id']  | 2.视频唯一id  object_id  |
        | ['video_object_list'][i]['nickname']  | 2.视频号昵称 |
        | ['video_object_list'][i]['username']  | 2.视频号v2_name |
        | ['video_object_list'][i]['object_nonce_id'] | 2.object_nonce_id |

        返回 60个视频号   50个视频（加密视频，无法播放，请自行使用url+decode_key 参数解密）

        cost            花费
        remain_money    余额

      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                key:
                  type: string
                  description: 极致了key （0.5/次）
                verifycode:
                  type: string
                  description: 如果设置了需要填写
                type:
                  type: string
                  description: 固定值 4
                keywords:
                  type: string
                  description: 关键词
              x-apifox-orders:
                - key
                - verifycode
                - type
                - keywords
              required:
                - key
                - verifycode
                - type
                - keywords
            example:
              key: '{{key}}'
              verifycode: ''
              type: 4
              keywords: 王者荣耀
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties: {}
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-214452163-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
